command: graphify query Use\ the\ current\ graph\ report\ to\ rank\ the\ top\ 12\ correctness\ risks\ at\ cross-community\ bridges.\ Focus\ on\ RegistryService\,\ get\(\)\,\ StateWatcher\,\ normalizeEvmAddress\(\)\,\ normalizeProtocolKey\(\)\,\ log\(\)\,\ RpcManager\,\ WorkerPool\,\ recommendGasParams\(\)\,\ discoverProtocol\(\)\,\ RouteCache\,\ and\ NonceManager.\ For\ each\ risk\,\ name\ owner\ files/functions\ and\ the\ concrete\ invariant\ that\ should\ be\ checked\ in\ source.
